_comment: Launch sequence template. Save as .megaphone/launch/sequence.json (or anywhere) and import with: python3 schedule.py add-sequence --file <path>. anchor_date is the launch day; offset is hours:minutes added to that day's 00:00 in the chosen timezone. Edit the items list to match the platforms you've drafted for and the order you want them to fire.
name: v1-launch-2026-05-15

items._note: earliest — Bluesky's tech audience is online by 6am PT
30 min after Bluesky to avoid identical-twin look in feed sources
right after the LinkedIn drop catches the morning dev.to feed cycle
Reddit r/SideProject; check that .megaphone/overrides/reddit.json sets the subreddit
